hero.headline: Preview databases for every branch, from one command.
hero.subtext: Fork production-parity Postgres in seconds, seed it from a snapshot, and tear it down when the branch merges. Your CI never shares a

items.title: fork in seconds, not hours
items.desc: Copy-on-write branching means a 400 GB production snapshot forks in under 3 seconds and costs storage only for changed

items.title: diff before you migrate
items.desc: Schema and row-level diffs against any branch. Destructive changes are flagged in CI before a human ever approves the

items.title: ttl so nothing leaks
items.desc: Every branch carries a time-to-live. Merged or abandoned branches are reaped automatically, with a 7-day undo window.

items.title: Masked seed data
items.desc: Column-level masking rules run at fork time. Engineers get realistic data shape without ever holding real customer PII.

items.title: CI-native by default
items.desc: First-class GitHub Actions and GitLab CI steps. One line gives every pipeline job its own isolated database.

items.title: Self-host or cloud
items.desc: Run the control plane in our cloud or your VPC. The data plane always stays inside your network boundary.

about.body: Loopdesk is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Product Demo
features: See it working on your data.

items.a: Yes — start free and upgrade when your team is ready.
Most teams connect their first repo in under an hour.
Annual plans include two months free — ask on signup.
